scripts.dev: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('node:fs'); const { execSync, spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); if (!existsSync('dist/renderer/editor.bundle.js')) { execSync('node scripts/build-renderer.mjs',{stdio:'inherit'}); } const electron = require('electron'); const env = { ...process.env }; delete env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; const result = spawnSync(electron, ['.', '--dev'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); if (result.error) { console.error(result.error); process.exit(1); } const status = typeof result.status === 'number' ? result.status : 1; process.exit(status);"
scripts.test:sector-u-full: npm run test:sector-u && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const r = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--test', 'test/unit/sector-u-u6-*.test.js', 'test/unit/sector-u-u7-*.test.js'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, SECTOR_U_FULL_A11Y: '1', SECTOR_U_FULL_VISUAL: '1' } }); process.exit(typeof r.status === 'number' ? r.status : 1);"
scripts.dev:fast: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, DEV_FAST_LANE: '1' }; const r = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['scripts/run-tests.js', 'fast'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); process.exit(typeof r.status === 'number' ? r.status : 1);"
